message:
fix(mol): add cycle detection to bond traversal to prevent OOM (GH#2719)

Add visited-set cycle detection to all recursive graph traversal functions
(loadDescendants, printTemplateTree, printMoleculeTreeWithParallel) and an
inverse-dependency check to bondMolMol to reject creating direct cycles.
Cycles are reported clearly instead of silently OOMing.

Based on maphew PR #2748 with minor comment fixes.

Co-Authored-By: matt wilkie <maphew@gmail.com>
